---
resources: amollo.pdf
about: 
  id: jfrench-heading
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - text: Email
      icon: envelope
      href: mailto:nichodemuswerre@gmail.com
    - text: GitHub
      icon: github
      href: https://github.com/gondamol
    - text: YouTube
      icon: youtube
      href: https://youtube.com/@gondamol
    - text: Scholar
      icon: google
      href: https://scholar.google.com/
    - text: CV
      icon: file-text
      href: amollo.pdf
---

:::nic-heading

Hello! Welcome to my portfolio website. Here I share my data science learning, research work and write blogs about a range of topics. 

I am a statistician and data scientist. I am currently pursuing my Master’s of Epidemiology and Biostatistics at [JOOUST](https://www.jooust.ac.ke/). I am passionate about using statistics and data science to learn from data, developing software to help others learn from data, and training others to do data analysis.

I help organizations to collect, Process, analyze, and communicate data-rom supporting everyday business decisions to driving global change
 
:::



<div class= "service-container">
<div class= "service-col1">
<img class="service-images" src="./images/beautiful.jpg" />
<h2 class="service-header">

Collect

</h2>

<p class= "service-paragraph">
I gather data using tools like [Kobo Toolbox]{.bolded-text}, [web
scraping]{.bolded-text}, [Airtable]{.bolded-text}, and [SQL]{.bolded-text} . 

<p>
</div>



<div class= "service-col2">
<img class="service-images" src="./images/construction.jpg" />

<h2 class="service-header">

Process

</h2>

<p class= "service-paragraph">

I perform data analysis, exploration, and apply statistical tests using
[R]{.bolded-text} and [Python]{.bolded-text}.

<p>
</div>

<div class="service-col3">
<img class="service-images" src="./images/beautiful.jpg" />
<h2 class="service-header">

Data Storytelling

</h2>

<p class= "service-paragraph">
I have experience creating interactive and static [visualizations]{.bolded-text} that 
communicate key insights.

<p>

</div>

</div>



<form action="projects.html">

<button class="see-projects-button">

see projects

</button>

</form>
